audience_policies.source_phrase: This pass admits up to 4 people (adults or children) at half price per person. This is an e-ticket which does not need to be picked up at the library . This pass is only valid for use on the date for which you reserve it. You must reserve your visit on the museum's website after

coupon.source_phrase_block: This pass admits up to 4 people (adults or children) at half price per person. This is an e-ticket which does not need to be picked up at the library . This pass is only valid for use on the date for which you reserve it. You must reserve your visit on the museum's website after receiving the pass . This pass is funded by the Friends of the Stoneham Library.
